scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node templates/tooling/lib/build-optional-visualizer.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run build && node dist/cli.js migration-report && node templates/tooling/verify/check-component-boundary-contract.mjs && node dist/cli.js check zone --path . && node templates/tooling/verify/check-agents-contract-set.mjs && npm run verify:task-packs && npm run verify:zero-start
scripts.frida:visual-viewer:demo: node dist/cli.js visual-viewer --overlay templates/tooling/verify/fixtures/visual-overlay/mounted_child_boundary.overlay.json --out dist/reference-viewer/demo/index.html --title "Mounted Child Demo"
scripts.verify:visual: npm run build && node templates/tooling/verify/check-visual-contract-consistency.mjs && npm run frida:visual && node templates/tooling/verify/check-visual-no-skip.mjs && node templates/tooling/verify/check-visual-schema-determinism.mjs && node templates/tooling/verify/check-visual-overlay-goldens.mjs && node templates/tooling/verify/run-visualizer-module-checks.mjs && node templates/tooling/verify/check-verify-visual-separation.mjs
scripts.prepack: npm run clean && npm run build
